releaseNotes: v0.28.1 — Polish on v0.28.0 plus a camera-scanner SDK refresh. (1) Grouped zone audits — when you scan a NEW bottle during a multi-zone audit run, the app now asks which member zone the bottle belongs to instead of silently dropping it into the group's primary zone. Single-zone runs are unchanged. (2) Camera scanner — refreshed the underlying ML Kit barcode SDK (mobile_scanner 5→7) and switched to BarcodeFormat.itf14 for ITF-14 codes (the deprecated 'itf' alias is gone). Camera scanning is still opt-in via Settings → Camera scanner. (3) Signup — rxrescue.us/signup now lets you pick monthly ($99/mo), annual ($990/yr), or multi-site plans ($79/site/mo or $790/site/yr) at signup time instead of emailing for annual + multi-site rates. (Already live on the site, no app update needed.) (4) Behind-the-scenes dep refresh — 7 packages bumped to latest within stable constraints. 545 tests passing.
